title: xanthoxalis refracta
intro: Xanthoxalis refracta, also known as yellow wood sorrel, is a perennial plant in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular choice in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Xanthoxalis refracta include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used topically to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
